title: Tool Requirements Policy
description: Schema for .deepwork/tool_requirements/*.yml policy files that define RFC 2119-style rules for AI agent tool calls.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what this policy enforces.

tools.description: Normalized tool names (shell, write_file, edit_file, etc.) or MCP tool names (mcp__server__tool) this policy applies to.

match.description: Optional parameter-level filtering. Keys are tool_input parameter names, values are regex patterns. Policy only applies when at least one pattern matches.

extends.description: List of policy file stems to inherit requirements from.

requirements.description: RFC 2119 keyed requirements. Keys are requirement identifiers, values define the rule and exception policy.

rule.description: RFC 2119 statement (using MUST, SHOULD, MAY, etc.).

no_exception.description: If true, this requirement cannot be appealed. Defaults to false.
